notes: No tweaks or fixes needed. Runs great out of the box as if it was running native. No problems as far as I can tell.
title: Runner3

notes:
1. Had to use the D3d11 tweak when I was using the nvidia 410 non-vulkan drivers, or else character models wouldn't load  

2. Had a bizarre bug once somehow when switching from windowed to fullscreen

3. Steam Controller not detected as gamepad, keyboard + mouse only  

4. PS4 controller detected as expected (in-game option switches the xbox icons to ps4)
title: Runner3

notes: Had to use Wine d3d11 to make it work. Got an error about not being able to initialize dx11 otherwise. The game works ok, no glitch found so far.
title: Runner3

notes: Does not support SDL controllers. Works great, otherwise.
title: Runner3
